home.title: Turn intention into action.
home.subtitle: Commit, prove, and get verified with AI.
home.hint: To get started, edit the page.tsx file.

hero.title: Build habits with verifiable commitments.
hero.subtitle: NxT turns goals into a simple cycle: commit points, do the work, submit proof, and let AI validate your action.

features.title: Designed for execution
features.subtitle: Clean UI, strong incentives, and a proof layer you can trust.

items.title: Verifiable proof
items.desc: Submit photo, OCR, location, or activity signals. AI checks consistency and reduces fake completions.

items.title: Points with consequences
items.desc: Stake virtual points to increase commitment. Win back more when you finish—lose them when you don't.

items.title: Gamified progress
items.desc: Streaks, levels, and rewards that feel motivating without becoming noisy or childish.

how.title: Commit → Prove → Resolve
how.subtitle: A loop that turns intention into measurable action.

steps.title: Commit
steps.desc: Define a goal, duration, and stake points. The more it matters, the more you stake.

steps.title: Prove
steps.desc: Upload evidence. Keep it simple: a photo, a screenshot, location check-in, or OCR text.

steps.title: Resolve
steps.desc: AI validates the proof. If valid, you earn rewards. If not, you lose the stake.

pricing.title: Start free, upgrade later
pricing.subtitle: NxT is built for momentum first. Premium comes after product-market fit.

cards.title: Free
cards.desc: Everything you need to begin proving action.

cards.title: NxT Pro (soon)
cards.desc: Deeper validation and automation for serious builders.

items.a: Not yet. NxT starts with virtual points. A future phase can introduce real staking once the core loop is solid.
Photos, OCR text extraction, location signals, and activity/screen-time style evidence depending on the goal type.

items.q: Can I use NxT with friends?
items.a: Social accountability is planned next: squads, group challenges, and a verified activity feed.

cta.title: Ready to turn intention into action?
cta.subtitle: Create your first commitment and make progress visible.

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Goals, proof, photos, and videos from the community

notifications.followDescription: Nima is now following your goals and proof updates.
notifications.commentDescription: Strong finish. Keep the morning streak going.
notifications.betDescription: 80 points were placed on your portfolio goal finishing this week.
